name: Weft Spider
senses: tremorsense 60 ft., blindsight 30 ft., passive Perception 15
languages: understands Deep Speech but can't speak

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Threadline Web
traits.description: As a bonus action (recharge 5-6), reshapes Threadline web in 120-ft radius. Area becomes difficult terrain; creatures starting turn in area must succeed DC 14 WIS save or move in a direction of the spider's choice.

traits.name: Web Sense
traits.description: Knows exact location of any creature in contact with the same surface within 120 ft.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.description: Can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down, without ability checks.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Weft Spider makes two Threadline Fang attacks.

actions.name: Threadline Fang
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing plus 9 (2d8) force damage. DC 14 CON save or speed reduced by 10 ft. until end of target's next turn.

actions.name: Weave Snare
actions.description: Targets one creature within 60 ft. DC 14 DEX save or restrained. Restrained creature can use action to make DC 14 STR (Athletics) check to free itself. Restrained creature takes 7 (2d6) force damage at start of each of its turns.

reactions.name: Thread Anchor
reactions.description: When moved against its will, negates the movement. When hit by melee attack, can pull attacker 10 ft. closer (DC 14 STR save negates).

lairActions.name: Threadline Pulse
lairActions.description: Each creature in web must succeed DC 14 DEX save or be pulled 15 ft. toward the spider.

lairActions.name: Reality Fold
lairActions.description: The spider teleports to any point within its web within 60 ft.

lairActions.name: Web Collapse
lairActions.description: 20-ft-radius area becomes void. Creatures fall 20 ft. into raw Fray (2d10 force, DC 14 DEX half), then reappear prone at the area's edge.

name: The Loom-Ghost
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.description: Can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain. Takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Weaver's Memory
traits.description: Can be consulted 3 times (DC 17 INT Arcana or CHA Persuasion). Success: true information. Failure: corrupted information.

traits.name: Pattern Aura
traits.description: Creatures within 30 ft. starting their turn must succeed DC 16 WIS save or have disadvantage on concentration checks until start of next turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (2/Day)
traits.description: If the Loom-Ghost fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Loom-Ghost makes two Pattern Rend attacks.

actions.name: Pattern Rend
actions.description: Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) psychic damage. DC 17 INT save or one random spell slot of 3rd level or lower is expended.

actions.name: Binding Fragment
actions.description: Each creature within 30 ft. must make DC 17 WIS save. Failure: Incapacitated, speed 0, for 1 minute (repeat save end of each turn). Success: 14 (4d6) psychic damage, immune for 24 hours.

actions.name: Unweave Ward
actions.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 60 ft., one magical barrier or ward. Hit: 22 (4d10) force damage to the ward.

legendaryActions.name: Phase Shift (1 Action)
legendaryActions.description: Teleports up to 30 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see.

legendaryActions.name: Memory Lash (1 Action)
legendaryActions.description: One creature within 60 ft. must succeed DC 17 INT save or take 10 (3d6) psychic damage.

legendaryActions.name: Corrupted Song (2 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Uses Binding Fragment if available, or makes one Pattern Rend attack.

name: Thread-Sovereign
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Consumed Memories
traits.description: Can mimic any voice it has heard. Advantage on Deception and Insight checks.

traits.name: Fray Commander
traits.description: All Fray creatures within 120 ft. act on its initiative and obey telepathic commands. Fray creatures within range have advantage on attack rolls.

traits.name: Ward Mantle
traits.description: Resistance to radiant damage, advantage on saves against Wardweaver/cleric spells. Lost until end of next turn if it takes 30+ radiant damage in one turn.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.description: If the Thread-Sovereign fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Thread-Sovereign makes two Thread Lash attacks and one Consume Pattern attack.

actions.name: Thread Lash
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) slashing plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

actions.name: Consume Pattern
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) necrotic damage. DC 17 CON save or gain 1 level Fray Exposure. Critical hit: 2 levels.

actions.name: Sovereignty Decree
actions.description: Each creature of its choice within 60 ft. must make DC 16 WIS save. Failure: Dominated until end of its next turn. Fray creatures in area take an extra action.

reactions.name: Unravel Spell
reactions.description: When a creature within 60 ft. casts a spell of 4th level or lower, makes INT check (DC 10 + spell level). Success: spell fails, slot expended.

legendaryActions.name: Command Fray (1 Action)
legendaryActions.description: One Fray creature within 120 ft. can move up to its speed or make one attack.

legendaryActions.name: Consume Ward (2 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Targets one magical effect or ward within 30 ft. Deals 22 (4d10) force damage. If ward destroyed, Sovereign regains 22 HP and Ward Mantle reactivates.

legendaryActions.name: Summon Fray (3 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Summons 1d4 Looselings or 1 Thread-Puppet in unoccupied spaces within 30 ft.

name: The Unweaver
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Erasure Aura
traits.description: Creatures within 10 ft. take 7 (2d6) force damage at start of Unweaver's turn. DC 18 CON save or one nonmagical item destroyed.

traits.name: Threadline Follower
traits.description: Knows direction to nearest Loom Stone, ward circle, or powerful weave magic within 1 mile. Cannot be surprised by creatures with active magical effects.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.description: If the Unweaver fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Methodical Destruction
traits.description: Attacks ignore resistance to force damage. Creatures immune to force damage instead have resistance.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Unweaver makes three Unraveling Touch attacks.

actions.name: Unraveling Touch
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) force plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage. Concentration DC for this damage is increased by 2.

actions.name: Erase Pattern
actions.description: 30-ft cube within 120 ft. DC 18 CON save. Failure: 45 (10d8) force damage + lose highest spell slot. Success: half damage, no slot loss. Wards take 55 (10d10) force damage.

actions.name: Void Step
actions.description: Bonus action: teleport 60 ft. Departure point becomes 5-ft radius difficult terrain dealing 7 (2d6) force damage on entry/start of turn for 1 minute.

reactions.name: Unmaking
reactions.description: When hit by spell attack or fails spell save, makes INT check (DC 10 + spell level). Success: spell countered, Unweaver regains 10 HP per spell level.

legendaryActions.name: Threadline Sever (2 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Targets one creature within 60 ft. under a spell/magical effect. DC 18 CHA save or one ongoing effect ends.

legendaryActions.name: Cascade Unravel (3 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Each creature within 30 ft. DC 18 DEX save or 21 (6d6) force damage. Fray creatures healed for same amount instead.

lairActions.name: Thread Collapse
lairActions.description: 20-ft radius area within 120 ft. becomes unraveled terrain (difficult terrain, 2d6 force on entry/start of turn) for the encounter.

lairActions.name: Reality Echo
lairActions.description: Illusory duplicate appears within 60 ft. AC 10, 1 HP. Can be targeted by attacks/spells until destroyed or next initiative 20.

lairActions.name: Pattern Drain
lairActions.description: Each creature in lair with active spell effects: DC 18 CHA save or all active spell durations reduced by 1 minute (min 1 round).

name: Void Loom
damageImmunities: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks
senses: truesight 120 ft., tremorsense 60 ft., passive Perception 20

traits.name: Fray-Born
traits.description: Immune to Frightened. Resistance to force damage. When reduced to 0 HP, unravels into loose threads that dissolve in 1d4 rounds.

traits.name: Immobile
traits.description: Cannot move or be moved. Occupies 60-ft radius spherical zone centered on nexus point.

traits.name: Anti-Pattern Zone
traits.description: Within 60-ft zone: divination auto-fails, teleportation requires DC 19 INT save or random destination, counts as Unraveled weave, nonmagical light extinguished, magical light halved.

traits.name: Pattern Overwrite
traits.description: At start of its turn, converts 10-ft radius area to anti-pattern terrain (4d6 force at start of turns, no save). Only Binding Song, Wish, or destroying the Void Loom can restore.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.description: If the Void Loom fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Nexus Vulnerability
traits.description: Nexus (corrupted Loom Stone) at center: AC 25, 80 HP (separate). If destroyed, zone shrinks 20 ft/round. Binding Song within 30 ft deals 55 (10d10) radiant per successful skill challenge round.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Void Loom uses Fray Tendril three times and Spawn Fray once.

actions.name: Fray Tendril
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 60 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d6 + 8) force plus 9 (2d8) necrotic. DC 19 STR save or pulled 20 ft. toward nexus.

actions.name: Spawn Fray
actions.description: Creates 1d4 Looselings, or 1 Thread-Eater, or 1 Hollow Walker in unoccupied spaces within its zone.

actions.name: Reality Inversion
actions.description: 30-ft sphere within zone. Gravity reverses (3d6 bludgeoning), healing deals damage and damage heals Void Loom, saves at disadvantage. DC 19 WIS save negates gravity reversal.

legendaryActions.name: Pattern Pulse (2 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Each creature within 60-ft zone DC 19 CON save or gain 1 level Fray Exposure.

legendaryActions.name: Void Surge (3 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Anti-pattern terrain expands 15 ft. from current edge. Creatures in new area: 28 (8d6) force (DC 19 DEX half), pushed to nearest edge.

lairActions.name: Tendril Cage
lairActions.description: Up to 3 creatures in zone: DC 19 DEX save or restrained until end of their next turn.

lairActions.name: Zone Shift
lairActions.description: Geography within zone rearranges. Creatures: DC 19 WIS save or disadvantage on attacks until end of next turn.

lairActions.name: Absorption
lairActions.description: All magical effects in 20-ft radius area end. Void Loom regains 10 HP per spell level absorbed.

name: Weaver Fragment
damageResistances: bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Incorporeal Movement
traits.description: Can move through creatures and objects as difficult terrain. Takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.description: If the Weaver Fragment fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Tapestry Weaver
traits.description: The Fragment can reshape reality within 60 ft. as a lair action. This is instinctive, not hostile. The Fragment tries to weave mortals into the Tapestry because that is all it knows.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The Weaver Fragment makes two Pattern Weave attacks.

actions.name: Pattern Weave
actions.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +14 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d8 + 8) radiant plus 14 (4d6) force damage. Target must succeed DC 19 CHA save or be Restrained as reality threads bind them (escape: DC 19 STR or CHA check).

actions.name: Absorb into Tapestry
actions.description: One Restrained creature within 60 ft. must succeed DC 19 CHA save. Failure: transported to pocket dimension inside the Tapestry. Incapacitated and takes 22 (4d10) radiant at start of each turn. Another creature can free them with DC 19 Arcana check or Performance DC 16 Binding Song.

legendaryActions.name: Shift (1 Action)
legendaryActions.description: Teleports up to 60 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see.

legendaryActions.name: Thread Burst (2 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: 20-ft. radius centered on the Fragment. DC 19 DEX save. 28 (8d6) radiant damage, half on save.

legendaryActions.name: Reweave (3 Actions)
legendaryActions.description: Reshapes a 30-ft. cube of terrain within 120 ft. Walls appear, floors shift, passages seal or open.
